title: grusonia deinacantha
intro: Grusonia deinacantha, also known as the chain fruit cholla, is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Grusonia deinacantha include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
